3027070.name: Whispers in the Moss Official Soundtrack
3027070.description: The official soundtrack to Whispers in the Moss includes all 55 tracks from the game's soundtrack as they appear in the game. The music, composed by Tapio of Uncultured Games, is inspired by the 8-bit and 16-bit JRPG greats, drawing special inspiration from legendary composers like Nobuo Uematsu, Yasunori Mitsuda, Michiru Ōshima, and Yoko Shimomura. The combined length of the soundtrack is 1:25:36.
